dialogos.texto_en: Five years later%p-2;――
Welcome%p-2;――
Oh, it's you guys.
Ichika, welcome back!
Been a while.
It's good to see you guys. \nAnd you're in a good shape as well.
And I see the shop is obviously bursting at the seams with customers.
Yeah, yeah, and here I thought you were better at those sarcastic American-style jokes.
Oh, come on, Nino.\nShe came all the way from America just for you.
It wasn't just for Nino, you know?\nI planned to come no matter what.
And don't worry about it, Nino.\nYou're doing great as you are.
I'm as usual you know.
That's right.\nThe bride is calm, as she always is.
You're just too calm Nino.\nYou should have taken the day off from the shop today.
Miku said she could handle the shop on her own,\nso I left it to her.\nWho knows what will happen if she's in charge.
So, Yotsuba came to help too.
Yotsuba can only handle the floor work, right?\nYou're the one who does all the cooking.
We're telling you, things are going to be fine.
Besides, Nino, once you get married,\nyou'll go to Futaro's place.
Oh, that's right, we talked about that.
Nino, you taught us how to cook\nso we could manage the cafe without you, remember?
But this girl is always so clumsy.
You're the only one who thinks that, Nino.\nGrow up already.
Huh?!
Ahaha!\nShe really came at you, eh.
Will you help in the shop from now on, Yotsuba?
Yeah, I plan to come help occasionally.\nHow about you, Itsuki?
What are you talking about?\nItsuki is a schoolteacher, you know?\nShe doesn't have that kind of time.
Yeah, it might be a little difficult.\nSorry.
That's okay.\nYou finally got your dream job,\nso put all your efforts into that.
And you too, Yotsuba.\nPrioritize what you really want to do\nover helping out here.
You too, Miku, consider hiring part-time workers\ninstead of relying only on Yotsuba and Raiha-chan.
If you only rely on family,\nyou may be in trouble when something happens.
Oh my, oh my.\nMaybe we really need to grow up.
Th-that's why! I'm worried about the shop!\nWe finally have more regulars,\nand things are starting to look up.
I want to make sure we don't disappoint Futaro's dad,\nwho lent us this place.
I understand.\nLeave it to me, Nino.
...Okay.\nI'm counting on you, Miku.
Maybe someday we can open\na second 'NAKANO' store in Tokyo,\nand surprise you, Nino.
Oh, if that happens,\nI can work at the second store too, you know?
Teehee, that's a big dream.
Well then.\nWe can't talk for too long, can we?
Here.\nThese are Mom's heirloom earrings.
This is our wedding gift to you, Nino.
Alright, here we go.\nOne, two, three!
Nino, congratulations on getting married!
Thanks.
What about the ones you were holding onto, Nino?
I brought them.\nIt turns out I had them in storage until today.
Are your piercings still there? Oh, they are?
Yes.\nI asked Futaro to help me open them.
I never thought I'd end up\nopening them five years later.
Five years later?\nWhat are you talking about, now?
Remember when you borrowed my piercer?\nI wanted Futaro to help me pierce my ears then.
Oh, that's right.
Well, we never pierced my ears with them.
Why not?
That's... Well, it doesn't matter, right?\nI just didn't feel like opening them for some reason.
Weren't you just scared?
No, that's not it.\nI told you, I said I would get them pierced\nby the time I wore my wedding dress.
Oh, that's right, you did say that.
It's funny that Uesugi-kun,\nwho tried to help me do that back then,\nis the groom, five years later.
It's romantic. So lovey-dovey.
Yes, Futaro and I are very lovey-dovey.
...Thank you for the display.
We actually planned\nto pierce your ears ourselves.
It's a shame, that Futaro-kun beat us to it. \nWe were looking forward to pierce your ears.
Too bad for you.
Well then, shall we head to the venue\nwhere the groom is waiting?
There are some preparations to be made.
Right, my makeup artist is here right now.\nMy dress is also ready.
Nino, are you sure about this?\nAre you okay?
I said it's what I want, so I'll be fine.\nOnce I've made up my mind, I'll see it through.
That's right.\nWe'll have to have Uesugi-kun confirm it.
I wonder what kind of expression Futaro will make.
He'll probably be really angry.\nLike, 'what the heck are you guys doing?'
